summary: Iteration 101: Testing Language Picker and DirectedStudio Project List. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: P0.1 Language selector shows 6 languages (EN, PT, ES, FR, DE, IT) with current language highlighted; P0.2 DirectedStudio loads 45 projects correctly; P0.3 Project search filters correctly (search 'abraao' shows filtered results); P0.4 Loading state shows 'Carregando projectos...' spinner. Backend API GET /api/studio/projects returns projects with correct structure.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx: Language picker (lines 121-137) correctly implements LANGUAGES array with 6 options and handleChangeLang function
Settings.jsx: Language picker panel (lines 307-330) has proper data-testid attributes for all language options (lang-option-{code})
DirectedStudio.jsx: loadProjects async function (lines 87-106) correctly fetches projects from /api/studio/projects
DirectedStudio.jsx: projectSearch state (line 55) and projectsLoading state (line 56) properly implemented
DirectedStudio.jsx: Loading state (lines 890-895) shows 'Carregando projectos...' spinner when projectsLoading is true
DirectedStudio.jsx: Project search filter (lines 803-815) correctly filters by name and briefing
studio.py: _ensure_ffmpeg function (lines 36-61) properly checks and auto-installs FFmpeg
studio.py: _upload_to_storage (lines 112-161) has improved chunked fallback for large files with retry logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language picker and DirectedStudio project list features verified. Key flows: (1) Settings page > click 'Idioma' > language picker panel opens with 6 languages, (2) Marketing Studio > click 'Estudio' > DirectedStudio loads with project list, (3) Search input filters projects by name/briefing. Navigation: Settings at /settings, Marketing Studio at /marketing/studio. DirectedStudio button has data-testid='campaign-type-directed_studio'. Project search has data-testid='project-search-input'. Language options have data-testid='lang-option-{code}'.

P0.1_language_selector.details: Language picker in Settings page shows 6 languages (EN, PT, ES, FR, DE, IT). Current language (PT) is highlighted with checkmark. Clicking a language changes it and shows toast notification.

P0.2_project_list.details: DirectedStudio loads 45 projects correctly. Projects display with name, status, scene count, and video count.

P0.3_project_search.details: Search input filters projects by name and briefing. Search 'abraao' shows filtered results with count indicator showing 'X projectos (45 total)'.

P0.4_loading_state.details: Loading state shows 'Carregando projectos...' spinner with RefreshCw icon when projectsLoading is true.

backend_api.details: GET /api/studio/projects returns projects list with correct structure (id, name, status, scenes, characters, outputs).

ffmpeg_and_supabase_verification.ffmpeg_auto_install: Code verified - _ensure_ffmpeg function checks for FFmpeg and auto-installs if missing
ffmpeg_and_supabase_verification.supabase_upload_robustness: Code verified - _upload_to_storage has chunked fallback for files >45MB with 3 retry attempts
